parsed.production_notes: The video heavily relies on AI-generated imagery. The presenter's lip-sync is slightly unnatural, and facial expressions are stiff. B-roll scenes show AI-typical smoothing and lighting artifacts.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, fair complexion, dark hair styled in an elegant bun. She wears gold earrings and a necklace.
characters.wardrobe: White saree with a red border, worn under a black graduation gown with gold trim.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, dark hair.
characters.wardrobe: Casual clothing, including a blue t-shirt.

scenes.setting: Bedroom and study desk, cozy lighting

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man lies in bed under a mosquito net, looking at his smartphone. The room is dimly lit with natural light. The scene cuts to him sitting at a wooden desk, looking at his phone instead of an open book. A desk lamp provides warm light.

scenes.visual_description: A young man is shown wasting time on his phone in bed and at his desk. Text overlays highlight the amount of time spent on social media.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: সকালে উঠে প্রথমে কি করো? Instagram খোলো। রাতে ঘুমাতে যাওয়ার আগে? Reels দেখো। মাঝখানেও? Reels। রোজ চার ঘণ্টা। [What do you do first thing in the morning? Open Instagram. Before going to sleep at night? Watch Reels. In between? Reels. Four hours every day.]
scenes.on_screen_text: সকালে উঠে প্রথমে কি করো? Instagram খোলো। রাতে ঘুমাতে যাওয়ার আগে Reels দেখো। মাঝখানেও Reels। রোজ চার ঘণ্টা। (What do you do first thing in the morning? Open Instagram. Before going to sleep at night Watch Reels. In between Reels. Four hours every day.)

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman stands at a wooden podium, speaking directly to the camera. She wears a white saree and a black graduation gown. The background is a blurred university convocation setting with a banner and flags. She uses hand gestures to emphasize her points.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter addresses the audience from a podium, emphasizing her points with hand gestures. Captions appear on screen as she speaks.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: কিন্তু ইংরেজি শিখতে পনেরো মিনিট নেই? এটাই তোমার সবচেয়ে বড় ভুল। তুমি রোজ চার ঘণ্টা ফোনে নষ্ট করো। আমি বলছি না ফোন চালাও না। আমি বলছি ওই চার ঘণ্টা থেকে শুধু পনেরো মিনিট বের করো। ব্যাস, পনেরো মিনিট। [But you don't have fifteen minutes to learn English? This is your biggest mistake. You waste four hours on your phone every day. I'm not saying don't use your phone. I'm saying just take out fifteen minutes from those four hours. That's it, fifteen minutes.]
scenes.on_screen_text: কিন্তু ইংরেজি শিখতে পনেরো মিনিট নেই? এটাই তোমার সবচেয়ে বড় ভুল। তুমি রোজ চার ঘণ্টা ফোনে নষ্ট করো। আমি বলছি না ফোন চালাও না। আমি বলছি ওই চার ঘণ্টা থেকে শুধু পনেরো মিনিট বের করো। ব্যাস, পনেরো মিনিট। (But you don't have fifteen minutes to learn English? This is your biggest mistake. You waste four hours on your phone every day. I'm not saying don't use your phone. I'm saying just take out fifteen minutes from those four hours. That's it, fifteen minutes.)

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone screen displays an educational app interface. The screen scrolls through various video thumbnails featuring different instructors and topics. The layout is dark-themed with colorful video covers.
A circular inset in the top left corner shows the young woman in the graduation gown speaking.

scenes.visual_description: An app screencast shows the interface while the presenter speaks in a PIP inset. Text overlays highlight key benefits.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: English Seekho অ্যাপ ডাউনলোড করো। এখানে এক্সপার্টরা আছে। ছোট দুই-পাঁচ মিনিটের ভিডিও সহজে বুঝিয়ে দেয় আর ইংরেজি বলতে শেখায়। একটা রিলের টাইমে একটা লেসন শেষ। রিল তোমাকে কিছু দেয় না, এখান থেকে স্কিল আসে। ইংরেজি কঠিন? না। এক্সপার্টরা এত সহজ করে শেখায় যে ছোট বাচ্চারাও পারে। [Download the English Seekho app. There are experts here. Short two-to-five-minute videos explain things easily and teach you to speak English. One lesson is finished in the time of one reel. Reels give you nothing, from here you get skills. Is English difficult? No. Experts teach it so simply that even small children can do it.]
scenes.on_screen_text: English Seekho অ্যাপ ডাউনলোড করো। এখানে expert-রা আছে। ছোট দুই-পাঁচ মিনিটের ভিডিও সহজে বুঝিয়ে দেয় আর ইংরেজি বলতে শেখায়। একটা Reel-এর টাইমে একটা lesson শেষ। Reel তোমাকে কিছু দেয় না, এখান থেকে skill আসে। ইংরেজি কঠিন? না। expert-রা এত সহজ করে শেখায় যে ছোট বাচ্চারাও পারে। (Download the English Seekho app. There are experts here. Short two-to-five-minute videos explain things easily and teach you to speak English. One lesson is finished in the time of one Reel. Reel gives you nothing, from here you get skills. Is English difficult? No. Experts teach it so simply that even small children can do it.)

panels.panel_visual_description: The young woman continues speaking from the wooden podium. She maintains eye contact and uses expressive hand gestures. She wears the white saree and black graduation gown against a blurred convocation background.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter explains app features from the podium. Captions appear on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: বেসিক থেকে শুরু। Hello, Thank you, Excuse me। তোমার কাজ দেখো আর বলো। আর একটা পাওয়ারফুল ফিচার আছে। এই অ্যাপে টুয়েন্টি-ফোর সেভেন ইংলিশ কোচ আছে। যখন ইচ্ছা তখন প্র্যাকটিস করা যায়। সকাল, দুপুর, রাত কোনো স্টপ নেই। ভিডিওতে যা শিখো কোচের সাথে প্র্যাকটিস করো, রোজ। [Start from the basics. Hello, Thank you, Excuse me. Look at your work and speak. There is another powerful feature. This app has a 24/7 English coach. You can practice whenever you want. Morning, noon, night, there is no stop. Whatever you learn in the video, practice with the coach, every day.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Basic থেকে শুরু Hello, Thank you, Excuse me। তোমার কাজ দেখো আর বলো। আর একটা feature আছে। এই অ্যাপে twenty-four seven English coach আছে। যখন ইচ্ছা তখন practice করা যায়। সকাল, দুপুর, রাত কোনো stop নেই। ভিডিওতে যা শিখো coach-এর সাথে practice করো, রোজ। (Start from Basic Hello, Thank you, Excuse me. Look at your work and speak. There is another feature. This app has a twenty-four seven English coach. You can practice whenever you want. Morning, noon, night, there is no stop. Whatever you learn in the video practice with the coach, every day.)

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone screen displays the dark-themed educational app interface, showing various video lessons. The background behind the phone suggests a dimly lit room at night.

scenes.visual_description: A screencast of the app is shown in a nighttime setting with text overlays.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: সময় নেই? রাতে রিল দেখার জায়গায় পনেরো মিনিট প্র্যাকটিস করো। [No time? Instead of watching reels at night, practice for fifteen minutes.]
scenes.on_screen_text: সময় নেই? রাতে Reel দেখার জায়গায় পনেরো মিনিট practice করো। (No time? Instead of watching Reel at night, practice for fifteen minutes.)

panels.panel_visual_description: The young woman at the podium speaks with an encouraging expression. She gestures with her hands to emphasize the need to start learning. The setting and her attire remain consistent.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter urges the viewer to take action, with captions on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: অন্যান্য লোক রোজ একটু করে ইম্প্রুভ করছে। আর তুমি এখনো ওয়েট করছো। পরে করব দিয়ে কিছু হয় না। এটা হ্যাবিট হয়ে গেছে। [Other people are improving a little bit every day. And you are still waiting. Nothing happens by saying 'I'll do it later'. It has become a habit.]
scenes.on_screen_text: অন্যান্য লোক রোজ একটু করে improve করছে। আর তুমি এখনো wait করছো। পরে করব দিয়ে কিছু হয় না। এটা habit হয়ে গেছে। (Other people are improving a little bit every day. And you are still waiting. Nothing happens by saying 'I'll do it later'. It has become a habit.)

panels.panel_visual_description: A montage of three quick shots. First, a young man sits at a desk with a laptop, looking at his smartphone. Second, the young woman in the graduation gown speaks at the podium. Third, a first-person view shows hands holding a smartphone displaying the educational app, with a tranquil pond and a person on a bicycle in the background.

scenes.visual_description: A quick sequence of different learning environments and the presenter, with text overlays.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: আজ থেকেই স্টার্ট করো। না হলে তুমি পিছিয়ে পড়বে। সেম জব, সেম ইনকাম, সেম লাইফ। [Start from today. Otherwise, you will fall behind. Same job, same income, same life.]
scenes.on_screen_text: আজ থেকেই start করো। না হলে তুমি পিছিয়ে পড়বে। Same job, same income, same life। (Start from today. Otherwise, you will fall behind. Same job, same income, same life.)

panels.panel_visual_description: The young woman at the podium delivers her final message with a warm smile. She wears the white saree and black graduation gown. The blurred convocation background is visible behind her.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter gives the final call to action, with captions on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: English Seekho অ্যাপ ডাউনলোড করো। এক্সপার্টদের থেকে শিখো। কোচের সাথে প্র্যাকটিস করো। রোজ পনেরো মিনিট। [Download the English Seekho app. Learn from experts. Practice with the coach. Fifteen minutes every day.]
scenes.on_screen_text: English Seekho অ্যাপ ডাউনলোড করো। expert-দের থেকে শিখো। Coach-এর সাথে practice করো। রোজ পনেরো মিনিট। (Download the English Seekho app. Learn from experts. Practice with the Coach. Fifteen minutes every day.)

panels.panel_visual_description: A digital graphic showing a stylized smartphone displaying a purple and black app logo. The background is dark.

scenes.visual_description: An end card displays the app logo, a call to action, and a disclaimer.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: এখনই ইনস্টল নাও-এ ক্লিক করো। অ্যাপটা ডাউনলোড করে নাও। [Click on install now right away. Download the app.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
এখনই install now-এ ক্লিক করো। App-টা ডাউনলোড করে নাও। (Click on install now right away. Download the App.)
